DescribeJobLogs.resourcePoolId: For self-managed resource pools, pass the unique resource pool identifier (e.g., cce-1uji3ib5); for managed resource pools, pass aihc-serverless
DescribeJobLogs.queueID: Queue to which the training job belongs; for self-managed resource pools, enter the queue name; for managed resource pools, enter the queue ID
DescribeJobLogs.keywords: Log keyword filter condition used to retrieve logs containing the specified keyword
DescribeJobLogs.startTime: Log start time as a Unix timestamp; if not set, all logs since pod startup are returned. Valid range: 1970 to the current time
DescribeJobLogs.endTime: Log end time as a Unix timestamp; if not set, all logs since pod startup are returned. Valid range: 1970 to the current time
DescribeJobLogs.maxLines: Maximum number of log lines to return; if not set, all logs since pod startup are returned
DescribeJobLogs.chunkSize: Number of log lines aggregated into a single record; for example, setting to 10 groups every 10 lines as one record. Defaults to 1, meaning each line is returned as a separate record
DescribeJobLogs.marker: Log query pagination token used with the nextMarker field in the response. Usage: omit marker on the first request; if nextMarker in the response is non-empty, pass its value as marker in the next request to retrieve more logs; repeat until nextMarker is empty
